user.title: Choose a Flic 2 button
user.description: Hold the button for at least 6 seconds to put it in public pairing mode, then choose it below.

confirm.title: Pair {name}
confirm.description: Pair Flic 2 at {address} directly with Home Assistant. Keep the button in public mode by holding it for at least 6 seconds immediately before submitting.

error.pairing_failed: Pairing failed. Remove the button from its Flic Hub, hold it for at least 6 seconds, and try again.
error.pairing_timeout: The button stopped responding before pairing completed. Put it back in public mode and try again.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs.

abort.no_devices_found: No connectable Flic 2 buttons are currently in public mode.
abort.not_supported: This Bluetooth device is not a supported Flic 2 button.
